svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="LowLevelArchitecture" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-644" dy="-247" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1500" pageHeight="1050" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;align=left;" value="Backend — Low-Level Architecture (layered, com.delivery)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="760" x="60" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ctrl" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="Controller layer — REST endpoints, request validation, response DTOs (/api/v1)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="1120" x="60" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c1" parent="ctrl" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="OrderController" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="150" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c2" parent="ctrl" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="CatalogController" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="150" x="190" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c3" parent="ctrl" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="CheckoutController" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="150" x="360" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c4" parent="ctrl" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="DispatchController" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="150" x="530" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c5" parent="ctrl" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="DeliveryController" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="150" x="700" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c6" parent="ctrl" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="UploadController" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="150" x="870" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sec" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;" value="Cross-cutting security — SecurityConfig · JwtRoleConverter (realm_access.roles → ROLE_*) · TenantContext (JWT tenant_id, else X-Tenant-Id) · @PreAuthorize" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="1120" x="60" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="svc" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="Service layer — business logic, @Transactional, tenant/role checks, state transitions" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="1120" x="60" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" parent="svc" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="OrderService" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="140" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="svc" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="CheckoutService" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="140" x="180" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="svc" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="PaymentService" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="140" x="340" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" parent="svc" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="DispatchService" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="140" x="500" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" parent="svc" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="DeliveryService" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="140" x="660" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s6" parent="svc" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="FinanceService" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="140" x="820" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s7" parent="svc" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="UploadService" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="120" x="980" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mapper" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;" value="Mapper (Entity to DTO) · dto/ request and response payloads" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="560" x="60" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3cfg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;" value="S3Config → S3Presigner
(static creds / default chain, path-style for MinIO)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="520" x="660" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="repo" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="Repository layer — Spring Data JPA interfaces (no custom tenant filtering)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="1120" x="60" y="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1" parent="repo" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="OrderRepository" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="150" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2" parent="repo" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="ProductRepository" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="150" x="190" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3" parent="repo" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="DeliveryRepository" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="150" x="360" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r4" parent="repo" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="DispatchJobRepository" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="170" x="530" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r5" parent="repo" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="PaymentRepository" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="150" x="720" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r6" parent="repo" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="… per-domain" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="130" x="890" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;verticalAlign=middle;" value="PostgreSQL + PostGIS · entity/ JPA mappings · Flyway V{NNN}__*.sql (ddl-auto: validate)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="720" x="60" y="680" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3ext" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="MinIO / AWS S3" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="220" x="960" y="680" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dom" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Domain packages: auth · cart · catalog · customer · dashboard · delivery · dispatch · finance · geo · inventory · marketing · notification · order · payment · rating · support · tenant · upload · vendor" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="1120" x="60" y="820" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="le1" edge="1" parent="1" source="ctrl" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="svc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="le2" edge="1" parent="1" source="svc" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="repo"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="le3" edge="1" parent="1" source="repo" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.3;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="db"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="le4" edge="1" parent="1" source="s3cfg" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="s3ext" value="presign"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
